steps.title: Find the linked change
steps.content: The question asks what changed when Don Federico became a patron. The passage says he "ceased to write plays and assumed instead" the role of patron, directly linking the two events.

steps.title: Discard unsupported events
steps.content: Choice A mentions a poem and public recognition, neither of which fits the passage. Choice B invents an acting job. Choice D invents a move outside Madrid. The remaining choice matches "ceased to write plays." The answer is C.
